name: Orion Copper Mining Corp.
description: Orion Copper Mining Corp. is a Canadian-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the acquisition and advancement of high-quality copper projects. The company's primary asset is the past-producing Yerington Copper Mine located in Nevada, USA, which hosts significant copper resources. Orion is dedicated to leveraging modern exploration techniques and sustainable mining practices to unlock value from its portfolio, positioning itself as a key contributor to the global copper supply chain essential for the green energy transition and electrification.
